name: Corporate Multi-Facility Submission Merge
description:
You are an Environmental Engineer at a corporate logistics headquarters. The site managers for the Dallas and Houston logistics hubs have emailed their individual Tier II submission (.t2s) files. The Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ) prefers a single combined electronic submission for all facilities owned by the same parent company.

Goal: Import two separate facility submission files into the local Tier2 Submit database, combine them, and export a single master submission file.

Instructions:
1. Open the EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 application.
2. Import the Dallas facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\dallas_logistics.t2s (File > Import).
3. Import the Houston facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\houston_logistics.t2s.
4. Verify in the Facilities module that both 'Dallas Logistics Center' and 'Houston Logistics Hub' are now present in the database.
5. Select BOTH facilities and export them together as a single submission file (File > Export).
6. Save the exported master file exactly to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\texas_combined_2024.t2s.

Ensure that the final exported .t2s file contains the data for BOTH facilities.
